Drudge dashboard¶

As part of its archiving routine, our system routinely captures The Drudge Report, a news aggregator focused on Beltway politics, celebrity scandal, extreme weather and other catastrophes of American life.

Over the last 90 days, Drudge’s homepage has featured 5,808 stories on 374 different sites. The analysis here updates daily.

Top words¶

Here are the people, places and things featured in the most headlines, as well as each’s most commonly paired verb.

Rank Word Top verb Headlines Trend
1. TRUMP TAKE 151
Aug. 8 Nov. 5
2. BIDEN WANT 101
3. ELECTION VOTE 100
4. WAR GROW 89
5. PUTIN BLOW 74
6. DON ASK 69
6. COVID TEST 69
8. USA CONSIDER 68
9. ABORTION BAN 66
10. RUSSIA FIGHT 64
10. MUSK KNOW 64
12. CHINA MAKE 63
12. DEATH PREDICT 63
12. STUDY RISK 63
15. HOUSE CALL 60
15. POWER FORCE 60
17. SEX ACCUSE 59
18. DEMS SEE 58
19. REPUBLICAN PLUNGE 56
20. UKRAINE GROW 55
20. NUKE SHELL 55
22. RIGHT WANT 54
23. FLORIDA FACE 50
24. TRIAL FACES 49
25. REPUBLICANS TAKE 48

Top domains¶

Here are the 25 mostly frequently linked sites.

Rank Site Stories Percent
1. msn.com 685 11.8%
2. yahoo.com 575 9.9%
3. apnews.com 404 7.0%
4. wsj.com 313 5.4%
5. dnyuz.com 263 4.5%
6. dailymail.co.uk 239 4.1%
7. thehill.com 175 3.0%
8. cnbc.com 173 3.0%
9. the-sun.com 172 3.0%
10. cnn.com 162 2.8%
11. nypost.com 153 2.6%
12. nbcnews.com 135 2.3%
13. mediaite.com 123 2.1%
14. politico.com 116 2.0%
15. theguardian.com 114 2.0%
16. france24.com 103 1.8%
17. vice.com 87 1.5%
18. studyfinds.org 80 1.4%
19. axios.com 69 1.2%
20. washingtonexaminer.com 64 1.1%
21. dailystar.co.uk 50 0.9%
22. fox5ny.com 45 0.8%
22. jpost.com 45 0.8%
24. marketwatch.com 41 0.7%
25. variety.com 40 0.7%
